hero.title: We Enhance Your Recovery and Performance
hero.subtitle: Active rehabilitation and precise care. Beyond pain relief—improved function and performance.

about.title: Welcome to Our Clinic
about.intro: We believe in active rehabilitation and precise movement analysis to identify the real cause of your symptoms.
paragraphs: Our goal is to take you beyond pain relief to improve and strengthen your overall function and performance.
Our physiotherapists use evidence-based practices and tailor treatment plans to your specific needs and goals.

treatmentStrategy.title: Our Treatment Strategy
treatmentStrategy.description: We respect your time. On your initial visit we take your health history, evaluate your condition, and give you a thorough examination in a private room to find the cause of your pain, then establish a unique treatment approach.
highlights: Manual therapy, electrotherapy, and customized exercise programs
Modern diagnostic tools and assessment techniques
Regular progress assessments for optimal results
